dc:title: Cyclist on shaded wooded road near Isola Farnese
dc:description: Color photograph of a sunlit, unpaved rural road passing through dense green woodland, with trees forming a shaded canopy and steep earthen banks along both sides. A person with a blurred face stands near the right side of the road beside a loaded touring bicycle fitted with panniers and gear. Dappled light and shadows fall across the pale road surface. On the right, a chain-link fence and a posted sign reading "PROPRIETÀ UNIVERSITÀ AGRARIA DI ISOLA FARNESE" are partially visible among vegetation.
